creator: bsdx@looksharp.net
text:
update gcombust port from 0.1.41 to 0.1.42
I burned a cd with it to make sure it worked, and there were no plist changes needed.
Author mentions these changes:
BUGFIXES:
        * turned on a few compiler warnings and found at least one real
          signed/unsigned bug
        * cdparanoia improvments; better progressinfo and radiobuttons for
          choosing between cdparanoia/cdda2wav, by Kay Lehmann
          <kaymiehb@calvados.zrz.TU-Berlin.DE>
        * fixed a bug occuring when ripping and "Progressbar has own window"
          was disabled (reported by Kay Lehmann)
        * autoscrolling didn't always scroll all the way down in the cdrecord
          output, fixed
        * ja.po update (TAHARA Yuusuke <tahara@gnome.gr.jp>)
NEWS:
        * the audio view now also shows total time (based on a patch by
          Tim Gerla <timg@rrv.net>)

Fix: 

Apply this diff:
http://www.looksharp.net/~user1/gcombust41-42.diff
